overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse office from Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a dark, neon-lit interior workspace to a sunlit atrium with zen garden and pool deck. The footage showcases high-end modern architecture with holographic displays and mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk office with holographic workstations

agents.ego_description: walking into a high-end office space, approaching a large executive desk with glowing holographic displays

entered.detail: large dark desk with holographic interface displays
cyan-lit holographic monitors showing data readouts
tall shelving unit with white binders and books
crimson rug underneath the desk area
large framed artwork with orange and blue tones
reflective glass door with metal frame

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view entering a dark, luxurious cyberpunk office. The space features a large executive desk with holographic displays, white bookshelves, and a red carpet. The lighting is predominantly artificial with cyan neon accents against dark walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: office workspace transitioning to exit corridor

events.description: lighting gradually shifts from artificial cyan to warmer tones as the camera approaches the exit

agents.ego_description: circulating around the desk and moving toward an exit doorway, passing floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: doorway leading to a brightly lit atrium space
large glass window showing exterior city views

segments.scene_description: Moving through the office workspace, the camera circles the desk area and approaches an exit. The holographic displays shift to the left as the camera turns toward a doorway revealing bright natural light from an adjacent atrium.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern residential atrium with zen rock garden and glass skylights

events.description: exits the dark office into a vast sunlit atrium with wooden floors and glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through a spacious atrium, passing a zen garden with large rocks and raked gravel

entered.detail: light wooden flooring covering the large open space
overhead glass panels allowing bright sunlight to stream in
traditional Japanese garden with large boulders and raked sand patterns
floating staircase with red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically from dark interior to a bright, sun-drenched atrium with high ceilings and glass skylights. The space features a zen rock garden with carefully placed boulders, wooden flooring, and a modern staircase visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor-outdoor pool deck with dining area and city views

agents.ego_description: approaching a reflective infinity pool with views of the outdoor terrace and city skyline beyond

entered.detail: reflective water feature extending toward the exterior
modern dining table with chairs near the glass walls
open-air deck visible through the glass walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an indoor-outdoor transition space featuring an infinity pool that reflects the bright sky. The camera approaches a dining area with floor-to-ceiling glass walls offering views of the outdoor terrace and distant city skyline, maintaining the luxurious cyberpunk aesthetic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, neon-lit executive office into a bright, sun-drenched atrium. It begins by entering a luxurious workspace characterized by a red carpet and white bookshelves, where cyan neon accents cast a cool glow over a large desk and holographic displays. As the camera circles the desk area, the artificial lighting of the dark walls begins to recede. The scene then shifts toward an exit, with the holographic displays sliding to the left as the camera turns. Finally, the view opens through a doorway, transitioning from the moody interior into the brilliant natural light of the adjacent atrium.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dark, enclosed interior into a bright, sun-drenched atrium and open-air terrace. It begins with a dramatic shift in lighting as the camera enters a high-ceilinged space illuminated by glass skylights, revealing a zen rock garden with carefully placed boulders and wooden flooring. As the camera moves forward past a modern staircase, the environment opens further into an indoor-outdoor transition area. The scene then shifts toward a shimmering infinity pool that reflects the bright sky before gliding toward a dining area enclosed by floor-to-ceiling glass walls. Finally, the view expands to reveal a luxurious outdoor terrace overlooking a distant, sprawling city skyline.
